overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of Indiana Jones walking along a Mediterranean harbor pier during golden hour. The character explores the wooden dock, observes the boats and water, then ascends stone stairs into a cliffside town.

events.description: transitioning from stone walkway onto wooden harbor pier

agents.ego_description: walking from the stone harbor walkway onto the wooden pier entrance

entered.detail: weathered wooden dock planks extending over the water
large green and white fishing boat with 'ARNO' painted on hull
tall wooden masts of docked sailboats against the sky
hazy mountain range forming the backdrop of the harbor

segments.scene_description: The character begins on a stone harbor walkway and steps onto a wooden pier. The green fishing boat 'ARNO' is visible to the left, with tall masts and distant mountains framing the golden hour scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden harbor pier with docked fishing vessels

agents.ego_description: walking along the pier passing docked boats and local fishermen

notable_agents.action: group of men standing and conversing on the pier
fisherman sitting on wooden crate and fishing with rod

entered.detail: group of men in period clothing conversing on the pier
man sitting on wooden crate with fishing rod over the water
calm blue water of the harbor extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: Walking along the narrow wooden pier, the character passes the green boat 'ARNO' on the left and encounters NPCs standing and fishing on the right. The harbor water opens up to the right with distant ships visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier end with panoramic harbor and mountain views

events.description: character stops at pier end to observe the harbor view
character turns 180 degrees to walk back toward town

agents.ego_description: standing at the pier end looking out at the water and distant ships, then turning around

entered.detail: large ships and sailboats moored in the distant harbor
cluster of stone buildings built into the cliffside across the water

segments.scene_description: At the end of the pier, the character pauses to take in the wide harbor view with distant ships and cliffside buildings. After observing, the character turns around, bringing the green boat to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: return walk along harbor pier toward town entrance

agents.ego_description: walking back along the pier toward the stone stairway entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking toward the pier end

entered.detail: wooden cart loaded with barrels and crates on the pier
stone staircase leading up into the cliffside buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking back toward town, the character passes other pedestrians and approaches the stone stairway entrance. A wooden cart with barrels sits on the left side of the pier.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway ascending cliffside into historic town

events.description: exiting wooden pier onto stone walkway and stairs
entering shadow of cliffside buildings as ascending stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs into the cliffside town buildings

entered.detail: weathered stone steps ascending between cliff walls
ancient stone buildings built into the cliff face
stone archway entrance at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the pier and ascends a narrow stone stairway carved into the cliffside. The lighting shifts to shadow as the character climbs toward a stone archway entrance, with ancient buildings rising on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched harbor pier into the shadowed ascent of a cliffside town. It begins on a stone walkway as the character steps onto a wooden pier, passing the green fishing boat ARNO and local fishermen under a golden hour sky framed by distant mountains. As the camera reaches the end of the pier, the view opens wide across the harbor and distant ships before turning back toward the town, passing pedestrians and a wooden cart laden with barrels. The scene then shifts from the open waterfront to a more enclosed environment as the character leaves the pier and begins climbing a narrow stone stairway carved into the cliff. Finally, the warm light fades into shadow as the camera ascends toward a stone archway, flanked by ancient buildings rising along the rock face.
